prompt: I need to add my Notion API token to the ecosystem config. How do I set it up?
expected_output: Instructions for adding Notion API token to ~/scripts/ecosystem.env
expectations: References ~/scripts/ecosystem.env as the central config file
Shows the correct environment variable name for Notion token (NOTION_TOKEN or similar)
Explains how to source the env file from ~/.zshrc
Does not suggest editing ~/.zshrc directly for individual keys
Mentions the ecosystem.env.example file if applicable
